testcase.name: conc03_ConsistentResultsUnderConcurrency

failure.message: [All observed results must correspond to a valid hierarchy state. Unexpected results: %s[[ROLE_ADMIN]]] Expecting empty but was: [["ROLE_ADMIN"]]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: [All observed results must correspond to a valid hierarchy state. Unexpected results: %s[[ROLE_ADMIN]]] Expecting empty but was: [["ROLE_ADMIN"]] at com.research.rbac_testing.bugs.ConcurrentModificationTestsPatched.conc03_ConsistentResultsUnderConcurrency(ConcurrentModificationTestsPatched.java:264) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:565) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604)

testcase.name: conc02_HighConcurrencyStressTest

failure.message: [All follow-up reads should connect to a valid hierarchy state (MR violation count)] expected: 0 but was: 210

testcase.name: conc05_RapidModificationDuringQuery

failure.message: [Follow-up reads during rapid writes must equal the source result. Violations detected: 139] expected: 0 but was: 139

testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: [Follow-up reads during rapid writes must equal the source result.
